title: Icy 16x
description: Icy is a Pink and Light Blue Themed 16x PvP Texturepack Made for the Youtuber IcyL00L
body: Icy is a modern 1.21 (or 26.1 i guess T_T) minecraft PvP texturepack featuring an amazing light blue to pink gradient as its main theme. This is a texturepack made for the content creator named Icyl00l, so go check him out! https://www.youtube.com/@mc_simplified The texturepack features: - Diamond Tools and Armor - Netherite Tools and Armor - Enderpearl, Gapple, Bow and Crossbow, Mace - Animated Totem of Undyng - Enchant Glint - Bucket, Lava Bucket, Water Bucket - Cobwebs, Flint and Steel, Shears, Fishing Rod and Wind Charges - HUD - No Explosion Particles, Low Shield, Low Fire Enjoy!
